# Funding Boarddy

Boarddy is commercial software developed by **Huna Inc.** We are funded through commercial licenses, premium subscriptions, and enterprise deployments rather than community donations or sponsorships.

If you would like to support the development of Boarddy, the best way to do so is to buy a license or share Boarddy with your friends and colleagues!

* **Purchase a License**: Visit [huna.io/boarddy/buy](https://huna.io/boarddy/buy) (link will be active upon launch) to purchase individual or team commercial licenses.
* **Enterprise Inquiries**: Contact our sales team at [sales@huna.io](mailto:sales@huna.io) for bulk discounts, custom integrations, and dedicated support options.
* **Spread the Word**: Recommend Boarddy on social media, write blog posts, or share your setup in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/boarddy-io/boarddy/discussions).

Thank you for supporting the development of a fast, local-first productivity experience!
